{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Silent King’s madra
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] uses [[Silent King’s madra]] to project audible speech.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
